title: rubus × assurgens var. ferox
intro: Rubus × assurgens var. ferox, also known as the bramble thorn or thorny bramble, is a variety of the bramble plant that is characterized by its thorny stems and dark green, serrated leaves. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to stimulate digestion and relieve symptoms of diarrhea and dysentery. The health benefits of Rubus × assurgens var. ferox include its potential to aid in the treatment of various gastrointestinal issues, and it has been traditionally used as a treatment for wounds and skin irritations. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which can be used to support digestive health and promote wound healing.
